message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A head-and-shoulders portrait of a person with shoulder-length light brown hair held back by a black headband, wearing a dark blue V-neck jersey with small orange shoulder accents, centered against a plain light gray background. Strands of hair frame the face, and the jersey collar is visible at the bottom of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A head-and-shoulders portrait of a person with shoulder-length light brown hair held back by a black headband, wearing a dark blue V-neck jersey with small orange shoulder accents, centered against a plain light gray background. Flat, frontal lighting minimizes shadows across the face, collapsing depth into an even, shadowless surface. The subject faces the camera with wide eyes and a tense expression that conveys personal distress.
